title: Statusline Profile
description: A profile is the template unit: a named composition that selects components, places them into slots, and orders them. The host renders the profile resolved by STATUSLINE_PROFILE / the user default / the bundled example.

$schema.description: Manifest format tag identifying the profile format version.

name.description: Profile identifier (matches the file stem, e.g. full / minimal).

description.description: One-line summary of what the profile shows.

components.description: Component instances to render. The same id may appear multiple times (distinguished by order + config), e.g. ratelimit for the 5h and 7d windows.

instance.description: One placed component instance. id resolves user-layer-first (~/.claude/statusline/components/<id>), then plugin built-ins.

id.description: Component id to resolve and render.

slot.description: Slot to place into; overrides the component's placement.slot. top/middle/bottom = line widgets; row1/row2 = segments joined with ' · '.

order.description: Sort key within the slot (lower first); overrides placement.order.

config.description: Per-instance config passed to the component. Keys must match the component's config.schema; omitted keys fall back to schema defaults.

align.description: For segments (row1/row2): pin to the left group or the right group of the row, padded apart to fill the width. Ignored by line widgets.
